title: commelina umbellata var. gambiae
intro: Commelina umbellata var. gambiae is a variety of the Commelina umbellata plant, a type of flowering plant in the dayflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds and skin infections, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Commelina umbellata var. gambiae include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are traditionally used in African folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
